race.comment: AGADOO (3) is back after a break of three-and-a-half months. Started the last campaign impressively when in the placings over 1150m at Devonport Synthetic. Should be hard to stop. OVER SPRAY (2) returned last time with a solid second at Ipswich over 1100m after being in contention on the corner. Strips fitter now and is suitably placed to crack the maiden win. I AM GONE (6) returns from a spell of six months and is having her first run for a new yard. Finished eighth at Gosford over 1000m when first-up last time in work. Will be fit enough for this following a recent trial win and is among the chances. BOTTLES OF SHELLS (4) returned from a spell a week-and-a-half ago when she was prominent at the corner before being beaten 6 lengths into fifth over 1200m at Doomben. Better for that hit-out and should be thereabouts.
